mapper.insert: insert into playerWorldInfo (roleid,userId,rolename,career,level,csid,lastOffTime,horseId,wingId,fightPower,guildId,fashionBodyId,fashionWeaponId,createTime,plat,stateVip,shiHaiLevel,sex , playerVip, fashionHalo, fashionMatrix, spiritId,soulArmorId,fashionHeadId,fashionHeadFrameId,customHeadPath,useCustomHead) values(#{roleid,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{rolename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{career,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{csid,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{lastOffTime,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{horseId,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{wingId,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{fightPower,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{guildId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{fashionBodyId,jdbcType=INTEGER} ,#{fashionWeaponId,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{createTime, jdbcType=INTEGER},#{plat,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stateVip,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{shiHaiLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT},#{playerVip,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{fashionHalo,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{fashionMatrix,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{spiritId,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{soulArmorId,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{fashionHeadId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fashionHeadFrameId,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{customHeadPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{useCustomHead,jdbcType=TINYINT})
mapper.update: update playerWorldInfo set rolename=#{rolename,jdbcType=VARCHAR},career=#{career,jdbcType=TINYINT},level=#{level,jdbcType=INTEGER},lastOffTime= #{lastOffTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, horseId = #{horseId,jdbcType=TINYINT}, wingId = #{wingId,jdbcType=INTEGER},fightPower = #{fightPower,jdbcType=BIGINT},guildId = #{guildId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, fashionBodyId = #{fashionBodyId,jdbcType=INTEGER},fashionWeaponId = #{fashionWeaponId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, plat=#{plat,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stateVip=#{stateVip,jdbcType=INTEGER},shiHaiLevel=#{shiHaiLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT},fashionHalo=#{fashionHalo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, fashionMatrix=#{fashionMatrix,jdbcType=INTEGER}, playerVip=#{playerVip,jdbcType=INTEGER}, spiritId=#{spiritId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, soulArmorId=#{soulArmorId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, fashionHeadId=#{fashionHeadId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, fashionHeadFrameId=#{fashionHeadFrameId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customHeadPath=#{customHeadPath,jdbcType=INTEGER} , useCustomHead=#{useCustomHead,jdbcType=INTEGER} where roleid = #{roleid,jdbcType=BIGINT}
